title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese presents 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, reduce costs, and extend Claude capabilities. Plugins covered include Caveman, Exa, Firecrawl, Compound Engineering, Higgsfield, Anthropic Skill Creator, Legal, Frontend Design, and Security Guidance tools, plus alternatives like Morph, Codeburn, and BuildPartner.
